βλάψω: Singular/First-Person/Future/Indictive/Active of βλάπτω - 'I will Harm, I will injure, I will damage'
ἔβλάψα: Aorsit/First person/Future/Indictive/Active of βλάπτω - 'I Harmed, I injured, I damaged'
θύσω: Singular/First-Person/Future/Indictive/Active of θύω - 'I will sacrifice' or 'I will make a sacrifice'
ἔθυσα: Aorsit/First person/Future/Indictive/Active of θύω - 'I sacrificed' or 'I made a sacrifice'
λύω: Singular/First-Person/Present/Indictive/Active - 'I release, I set free; I undo, I destroy'
λύσω: Singular/First-Person/Future/Indictive/Active of λύω - 'I will release, I will set free; I will undo, I will destroy'
ἔλυσα: Aorsit/First person/Future/Indictive/Active of λύω - 'I will release, I will set free; I will undo, I will destroy'
